title: Cozy Living Room Corner with Green Armchair and Textured Decor
description: A warm and inviting living room corner featuring a plush green armchair adorned with a patterned pillow and a soft white throw blanket. Next to the armchair is a rustic wooden side table holding a ceramic vase with dried flowers, a stack of vintage books, and an amber candle. The space is softly illuminated by natural light from large windows, highlighting the rich textures and earthy color palette. A wooden bookshelf with pottery and books adds to the personalized and cozy atmosphere.
